name: C-library Direct Download
notes: This site can be queried directly through /s/<query> without first visiting the homepage.
The bundled Playwright provider reads real search-card attributes and download links directly from the DOM.

llmFallback.goal: Recover direct-download links from the C-library search results page when the lightweight adjacent-link selectors fail.
notes: Prefer the result whose title and author best match the requested book.
If the selected result is missing a direct download URL, return selectedResultIndex or downloadUrl.
